title: Living in Boulder Vlog 4 - 3 - 2017: 5120 kilometer diameter circles in background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog from Boulder, updating on his ongoing project organizing Google Earth folders and building a 'circles' chart with radius dimensions (up to 5,120 km and beyond). He reflects on his work schedule, exercise balance, a planned program launch in June 2018, and briefly mentions listening to content about a story he's developing.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: expects it to take the rest of the week into the weekend, sees it as important work worth the time
wants to balance project work with biking and exercise
plans to start a program in June 2018, feels a quarter of the year has already passed quickly
